info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Sales Order API

description.content:
Create, read, update, and delete sales orders in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_SALES_ORDER_SRV) supports full CRUD operations on sales order headers, items, partners, pricing elements, schedule lines, billing plans, and text elements. Sales orders are created using deep insert requests that include header and related entity data in a single call.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
